Package org.example.domain

Class Appointment

java.lang.Object
org.example.domain.Appointment
public class Appointment extends Object
Represents appointment in the system.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • Appointment

      public Appointment(String id, LocalDateTime startTime, int duration, int participants)
      Creates a new appointment object with the given values.
      Parameters:
      id - unique id used to find the record
      startTime - time value used by this method
      duration - appointment duration in minutes
      participants - number of people for the appointment

    • Appointment

      public Appointment(String id, String customerName, LocalDateTime startTime, int duration, int participants, AppointmentStatus status)
      Creates a new appointment object with the given values.
      Parameters:
      id - unique id used to find the record
      customerName - value for customer name
      startTime - time value used by this method
      duration - appointment duration in minutes
      participants - number of people for the appointment
      status - status value used for this operation

    • Appointment

      public Appointment(String id, String customerName, String customerEmail, LocalDateTime startTime, int duration, int participants, AppointmentStatus status)
      Creates a new appointment object with the given values.
      Parameters:
      id - unique id used to find the record
      customerName - value for customer name
      customerEmail - value for customer email
      startTime - time value used by this method
      duration - appointment duration in minutes
      participants - number of people for the appointment
      status - status value used for this operation

      public Appointment(String id, String customerName, String customerEmail, LocalDateTime startTime, int duration, int participants, AppointmentStatus status, AppointmentType type)

      duration - appointment duration in minutes
      participants - number of people for the appointment

    • Appointment

      public Appointment(String id, String customerName, String customerEmail, String customerPhoneNumber, LocalDateTime startTime, int duration, int participants, AppointmentStatus status, AppointmentType type)
      Creates a new appointment object with the given values.
      Parameters:
      id - unique id used to find the record
      customerName - value for customer name
      customerEmail - value for customer email
      customerPhoneNumber - value for customer phone number
      startTime - time value used by this method
      duration - appointment duration in minutes
      participants - number of people for the appointment
      status - status value used for this operation
      type - value for type

    • Appointment

      public Appointment(String customerName, String slotTime, int duration, int participants, AppointmentStatus status)
      Creates a new appointment object with the given values.
      Parameters:
      customerName - value for customer name
      slotTime - slot time text like 10:00
      duration - appointment duration in minutes
      participants - number of people for the appointment
      status - status value used for this operation

      duration - appointment duration in minutes
      participants - number of people for the appointment
      status - status value used for this operation
      type - value for type

    • isFeedbackSubmitted

      public boolean isFeedbackSubmitted()
      Checks whether feedback was already submitted.
      Returns:
      true when feedback exists for this appointment

    • setFeedbackSubmitted

      public void setFeedbackSubmitted(boolean feedbackSubmitted)
      Updates the feedback submitted flag.
      Parameters:
      feedbackSubmitted - flag that says if feedback was saved
